name: Green Chili Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound pork shoulder, cut into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the meat in flour.
2. In a deep skillet or heavy pot, brown the meat in lard.
3. Add onion and garlic. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until onions are tender but not browned.
4. Add remaining ingredients. Simmer, uncovered, for an additional 5 to 10 minutes or until desired consistency.
Serves 4-6.
